subdomain.description: Your EZOfficeInventory account subdomain (the <subdomain> in https://<subdomain>.ezofficeinventory.com). Used to derive base_url as https://{subdomain}.ezofficeinventory.com.

api_key.description: EZOfficeInventory API access token, sent as the token header. Never logged.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
